mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RN, A.* FROM ( SELECT R.C_NUMBER, R.COMMENTS, TO_CHAR(R.C_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') C_DATE, R.P_NUMBER, R.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME, R.C_STATUS FROM REPLY R JOIN USERS U ON R.USER_ID = U.USER_ID ORDER BY R.C_NUMBER DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RN >= #{startRow}
